query:
UPDATE tasks
        SET 
            title = COALESCE(?, title),
            description = COALESCE(?, description),
            status = COALESCE(?, status),
            priority = COALESCE(?, priority),
            due_date = COALESCE(?, due_date),
            sort_order = COALESCE(?, sort_order),
            tags = COALESCE(?, tags),
            updated_at = ?
        WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
